description: DIA oracle price feeds over x402: transparent, multi-source token quotations aggregated across 80+ CEX/DEX markets for 3,000+ assets. For agents that need verifiable reference prices for valuation, settlement or risk checks. Data by DIA.

endpoints.description: Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/v1/quotation/{symbol}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /v1/quotation/{symbol}
zh-CN.title: Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /v1/quotation/{symbol}
endpoints.title: Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs aggregated price quotation by asset symbol through the dia-price-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}
zh-CN.title: Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}
endpoints.title: Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address through the dia-price-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: 通过 x402 网关获取 DIA 预言机价格:跨 80+ CEX/DEX 市场、覆盖 3000+ 资产的透明多源聚合报价。适合 Agent 在估值、结算或风控中获取可验证参考价。数据来自 DIA。
zh-CN.subtitle: 去中心化、抗操纵的预言机价格,聚合 80+ 市场、覆盖 3000+ 资产。
zh-CN.title: DIA 预言机
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

sub_title: Decentralized, manipulation-resistant oracle prices aggregated from 80+ markets for 3,000+ assets.
subtitle: Decentralized, manipulation-resistant oracle prices aggregated from 80+ markets for 3,000+ assets.
title: DIA
use_case: Use to get a real-time, multi-market aggregated USD price for a token by symbol or by blockchain+contract address.
